channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Fake parcel delivery texts are the fastest-growing phishing scam this holiday season – here’s how to avoid them
item.description: Fake text message alerts claiming to be from legitimate courier services are the fastest-growing scam this holiday season – here's how to avoid them.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Yellowjackets season 3: release date, cast, trailer and more news and rumors about the hit Paramount Plus show
item.description: Here's everything we know about Yellowjackets season 3, including its February 2025 release date, the expected cast, and plot speculation.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Sweat the small stuff: Data protection in the age of AI
item.description: As concerns about AI security, risk, and compliance continue to escalate, practical solutions remain elusive.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple facilities. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union continued a strike Friday at seven of the company's delivery hubs just days before Christmas. At midnight on Saturday, workers at a prominent unionized warehouse in New York will also join, the Teamsters said.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: What to do if someone is shading you online
item.description: There are certain social media rules we can all agree on: Ghosting a conversation is impolite, and replying “k” to a text is the equivalent of a backhand slap (violent, wrong, and rude).
item.dc:creator: Steffi Cao, Fast Company

item.title: Senators urge Biden to delay TikTok ban
item.description: Sens. Ed Markey (D-Mass.) and Rand Paul (R-Ky.) urged President Biden on Thursday to grant TikTok a 90-day extension to divest from its China-based parent company or face a ban. The pair emphasized the current deadline is set for Jan.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Usyk vs Fury 2 LIVE: fight stream, REPLAY, cheapest PPV deals, watch the rematch of the century
item.description: Eager to watch the Tyson Fury fight? Here are the best streams, the cheapest prices and how to watch all 12 rounds live online as The Gypsy King faces his old nemesis at Saudi Arabia's Kingdom Arena
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: New iPhone auto-restart feature locks encrypted data after extended inactivity
item.description: Apple's iOS 18.1 Inactivity Reboot automatically reboots your iPhone if it hasn't been used or unlocked for more than three days, providing better data protection.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Chancellor Olaf Scholz on Friday dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany,” but said that freedom of opinion "also goes for multibillionaires.” Germany is expected to vote in an early election on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Google’s contractors told to evaluate Gemini responses outside their expertise
item.description: Behind the responses from genAI models are testers who evaluate those answers for accuracy, but a report released this week casts doubt on the process.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Need a Mac VPN? Norton VPN just got a serious upgrade that you'd expect it already had
item.description: A kill switch feature finally lands on Norton's macOS app, and the provider is also expected to add it to its iPhone VPN soon. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Repsol se adhiere al Pacto por la IA de la Unión Europea
item.description: Como ya viene siendo costumbre, la inteligencia artificial (IA) no ha dejado de copar titulares recientemente. La puerta abierta por parte de las autoridades europeas de permitir que se entrenen modelos de IA con datos personales sin el consentimiento explícito del propietario ha levantado ampollas.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Smart policing revolution: How Kazakhstan is setting a global benchmark
item.description: In the era of digital transformation, public safety stands at a critical crossroads. Law enforcement agencies globally are under increasing scrutiny to enhance transparency, efficiency, and trust within their communities.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Walmart is turning to data science to improve its delivery game
item.description: This holiday season, Walmart’s innovations in data science are enabling its stores to make deliveries to 12 million more households.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Giant sloths and mastodons lived with humans for millennia in the Americas, new discoveries suggest
item.description: New discoveries from several archaeological sites in North and South America suggest that ancient people first arrived in the New World much earlier than scientists once thought.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: If Meta prevails against Apple in Europe, AI surveillance will be a feature, not a bug
item.description: Anyone using any digital device needs to wise up to a looming threat as Meta attempts to exploit the Europe Union’s continued assault against the Apple ecosystem to launch what seems to be an open season on your privacy.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Australian who falsely claimed to have invented bitcoin is found in contempt of UK court
item.description: LONDON (AP) — An Australian computer scientist who falsely claimed to be the founder of the bitcoin cryptocurrency was found Thursday to be in contempt of an order of London's High Court and was sentenced to 12 months in prison, suspended for two years.
item.dc:creator: PAN PYLAS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Elon Musk considers funding Nigel Farage's populist party, a move that could shake up UK politics
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s a photo that sent a tremor through British politics: Elon Musk flanked by British politician Nigel Farage and a wealthy backer, in front of a gilt-framed painting of a young Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Massive data breach at federal credit union exposes 240,000 members
item.description: A credit union with over 240,000 members recently revealed it was targeted by cybercriminals, resulting in a data breach that was part of a two-month attack by hackers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Blinken announces aid for Sudan and talks about AI risks at UN Security Council
item.description: Secretary of State Antony Blinken has announced $200 million in humanitarian aid for conflict-torn Sudan during his likely final trip to the United Nations while in office.
item.dc:creator: Edith M. Lederer And Matthew Lee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Go 1.24 brings full support for generic type aliases
item.description: Go 1.24, a planned update to Google‘s popular open-source programming language, has reached the release candidate stage.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Getting started with Azure Managed Redis
item.description: Microsoft has made a lot of big bets in its preferred cloud-native infrastructure. You only need to look at .
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Create searchable Bluesky bookmarks with R
item.description: The Bluesky social network is seeping into the mainstream, thanks in part to people unhappy with changes at X (formerly Twitter). “It’s not some untouched paradise, but it’s got a spark of something refreshing,” Jan Beger, global head of AI Advocacy at GE HealthCare, posted on LinkedIn last month.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: FBI warning: Don't point lasers at mysterious drones
item.description: According to the FBI, pilots of manned aircraft are increasingly in danger of being blinded by lasers.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: VA EHR seeing fewer crashes amid plans to resume rollout
item.description: VA’s Oracle-Cerner EHR has seen a 50% decrease in crashes and lags since the VA completed its last round of updates in August. The post VA EHR seeing fewer crashes amid plans to resume rollout first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: YouTube’s top trends for 2024 include Bay Area creators
item.description: Online video giant YouTube has published its year-end top trends lists for 2024 and in includes Bay Area content creators.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: OpenAI rolls out upgrade to reasoning model, new dev tools
item.description: The release Tuesday by OpenAI of OpenA1 o1, its reasoning model, in API, along with three new sets of tools for developers, is a “smart move that keeps [it] in the corporate/enterprise conversation, as so many customers are shifting their focus towards agentic applications over simpler chat-based ap
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: OpenAI responds to Elon Musk's lawsuit
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
